footerContactAddress: Address: Rm. 526, Bldg. 52, 195, Sec. 4, Chung Hsing Rd., Chutung, Hsinchu 310401, Taiwan
heroTitle1: Defining the Future of Low-Carbon Materials
heroSubtitle: SusMaterial — A stable and competitive supplier of high-purity tungsten powder. Concurrently, through our entirely original metal recycling technology, we transform various special alloy wastes into high-value resources, providing zero-carbon material solutions for the tech industry, helping you achieve your ESG vision and circular economy goals.
section1Content: SusMaterial supplies high-purity high-purity tungsten powder (W Powder) and tungsten trioxide (WO₃) with a purity of over 99.9%, providing a stable source of raw materials for the semiconductor, precision machining, and passive component supply chains.
feature1Desc: Utilizing proprietary green technology to significantly reduce carbon emissions and energy consumption compared to traditional recycling processes, providing you with truly eco-friendly recycled materials.
feature2Desc: Capable of stably supplying tungsten powder chemicals with a purity of 99.9% or higher in batches, meeting the stringent raw material requirements of high-tech industries.
feature3Desc: Assisting your enterprise in its green transformation to confidently face the challenges of global low-carbon supply chains and regulations like the EU's CBAM, enhancing brand value.
aboutPageSubtitle1: Our vision is to become the world's leading 'low-carbon material supply partner,'
aboutPageSubtitle2: through highly efficient recycling processes, we stably supply high-quality metal raw materials.
aboutCore1Desc: Through mature recycling processes, we ensure a stable output of critical green materials, helping customers avoid price and supply chain volatility in international mineral markets.
aboutCore2Desc: Purity and quality are crucial for raw material applications. We focus on maximizing material purification processes to stably supply top-tier metal materials with a purity of 99.9% or higher.
aboutCore3Desc: We are committed to understanding the needs of various industries. Through strict quality control and customized capacity allocation, we provide the highest level of service to boost customer satisfaction and market competitiveness.
aboutTeamTitle: A Professional, Passionate, and Mission-Driven Team
aboutTeamIntro: Our team consists of experts in materials science, resource recycling, and business operations, all dedicated to addressing global environmental challenges with technological solutions.
aboutTeamCeoDesc: Specializing in waste-to-resource technology and materials science, he is the inventor of SusMaterial's core technology and has extensive experience in R&D and commercialization of new recycling technologies.
aboutTeamCtoDesc: An expert in material analysis and low-carbon process development, specializing in electrochemical technology applications and first-principles material simulation, ensuring our technology remains at the world's forefront.
aboutTeamCooDesc: Skilled in product design and cross-departmental operational integration, responsible for transforming innovative technology into stable and reliable business services, ensuring a perfect fit between technology and market needs.
aboutSdgTitle: Responding to UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
aboutSdgDesc:
SusMaterial's technology and business model highly align with international sustainability trends,
committed to bringing substantial positive impacts to the global environment.
aboutSdg9Desc: Promoting innovative upgrades in traditional metal recycling through revolutionary low-carbon refining, establishing a resilient and sustainable industrial foundation.
aboutSdg12Desc: Transforming waste alloys into high-purity recycled materials, maximizing resource utilization, and driving a perfect circular economy.
aboutSdg13Desc: Each ton of our high-purity tungsten powder reduces process carbon emissions by 40%-80%, assisting global enterprises in reaching Net Zero commitments.
techPageSubtitle1: Traditional metal recycling processes require cumbersome steps, which are not only time-consuming and energy-intensive but also generate significant chemical waste.
techPageSubtitle2: SusMaterial's 'Exclusive Recycling Technology' can be widely applied to the resource recovery of various high-value critical metals and special alloys.
techWhy1Desc: From principles to parameters, we have a comprehensive patent layout and technological protection, ensuring the exclusivity and leadership of our technology.
techWhy2Desc: Our equipment is lightweight and modular, easy to replicate and transfer, making it ideal for global technology export or establishing distributed recycling sites.
techWhy3Desc: Compared to traditional recycling processes, our product significantly reduces energy use and consumables, building a sustainable, low-carbon, circular green economy.
prodHeroSubtitle: Derived from original Taiwanese technology, we provide high-quality recycled metal powders that meet international standards to help enterprises build green supply chains.
prodWDesc: High-purity tungsten powder refined through exclusive processes, strictly tailored for powder metallurgy and cemented carbide production.
prodWO3Desc: High-quality tungsten chemicals offering excellent chemical stability, ideal for ceramic chemicals and sputtering target raw materials.
prodSpecNote: * Particle size and chemical composition can be adjusted according to customer application requirements.
servicesPageTitle: Professional, Green, and Efficient Metal Recycling Services
servicesPageSubtitle: We not only recycle metals but also create sustainable value for your business, helping you easily meet the challenges of the global green supply chain.
servicesList2Item1: Particle Size Control: Nano to micron-scale range.
servicesList2Item2: Purity Control: Providing different purity levels for various applications.
servicesList2Item3: Crystal Structure Design: Adjusting crystal orientation to optimize material performance.
servicesList3Title: ✓ The Value We Bring You
servicesList3Item1: Achieve ESG Goals: Significantly improve your corporate sustainability performance.
servicesList3Item2: Reduce Carbon Tax Risks: Assist you in complying with international regulations like the EU's CBAM.
servicesList3Item3: Enhance Brand Image: Demonstrate your commitment to environmental protection and the circular economy.
servicesList3Item4: Generate Extra Revenue: Turn waste into valuable recycling income.
servicesProcess1Desc: You can contact us via email or the contact form on this website. Please provide preliminary information about your waste type, estimated quantity, and current photos.
servicesProcess2Desc: Our expert team will conduct a preliminary assessment based on the information you provide. If necessary, we may arrange for sample analysis and provide a competitive official quote as quickly as possible.
servicesProcess3Desc: Both parties confirm cooperation details such as recycling price, quantity, and collection methods, and sign a formal contract to protect your interests.
servicesProcess4Desc: We will arrange for qualified environmental transport vehicles to collect the waste at your doorstep or designated location in accordance with the contract, ensuring the process is safe and compliant.
servicesProcess5Desc: The collected waste will enter our processing center, which uses innovative low-carbon technology, and be regenerated into high-purity materials through an efficient, eco-friendly process.
servicesProcess6Desc: After confirming the weight and quality of the waste, we will complete the payment according to the schedule agreed in the contract and can provide relevant recycling certificates as supporting documents for your corporate ESG report.
marketPageTitle: Embrace the Trend, Co-create a Green Supply Chain
marketPageSubtitle1: Low-carbon and circularity are no longer choices, but necessities for survival.
marketPageSubtitle2: Traditional high-carbon supply chains are facing immense pressure to be replaced,
marketPageSubtitle3: and this is the transformation opportunity SusMaterial brings to you.
marketPotentialTitle: The Enormous Potential of Recycled Materials
marketPotential1Desc: The global recycled metals market reached $670 billion in 2023 and is expected to continue growing at a CAGR of 6-8%.
marketPotential2Desc: Using one ton of recycled metal can reduce carbon emissions by an average of 40%-80%, making it key for companies to achieve net-zero targets.
marketPotential3Desc: From Apple to TSMC, leading global brands are now requiring their supply chains to significantly increase the proportion of recycled materials.
marketQuote: Recycled materials are the gold of the future manufacturing industry.
marketStrategy1Desc: Positioning ourselves as the 'material supplier with the lowest carbon footprint' to meet the strict ESG requirements of top-tier clients.
marketStrategy2Desc: Entering the market with high-purity, specially specified recycled products, targeting high-value applications such as semiconductors, aerospace, and precision industries.
marketStrategy3Desc: Acting as a 'technology enabler' to seek cooperation with brand owners, existing recyclers, and material supply chains to jointly build a sustainable ecosystem.
marketStrategy4Desc: Helping manufacturers recycle their waste and reprocess it into raw materials to be supplied back to the original factory, achieving a perfect 'closed-loop supply chain'.
marketClientsIntro: Whether you are a material producer, supplier, or end-user, as long as you value sustainability and supply chain resilience, SusMaterial is your ideal partner.
careersPageTitle: Join Us and Build the Next Generation of Excellence
careersPageSubtitle1: We are building a team that merges Silicon Valley's innovative spirit with operational excellence.
careersPageSubtitle2: We believe that an outstanding business is built on a healthy team.
careersValuesIntro: We are not trying to copy any single company, but to blend the best, creating our own formula for success.
careersValue1Desc: It's not just about finishing the job, but about doing it to the absolute best, setting the benchmark for the industry.
careersValue2Desc: We encourage innovation and provide the space to fail, because every attempt is a necessary step on the path to excellence.
careersValue3Desc: Creating a psychologically safe environment where frank communication is the norm and diverse voices are treated as our most valuable asset.
careersValue4Desc: We adhere to ESG principles and firmly believe that results should be shared by all who contribute.
careersBonus: ★ Additional performance bonuses and Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) are available.

contactPageSubtitle: Whether discussing technology integration, material sourcing, or green supply chain partnerships, our expert team is ready to provide tailored sustainable solutions.
contactFormDesc: Please fill out the form below, and our expert team will contact you within 1-2 business days.
jobApplyDesc:
Ready to join us? Please send your resume to:
info@susmaterial.com
jobEngAbout: You will be at the core of our R&D team, responsible for transforming innovative green technology from the lab into stable, scalable commercial processes. You are the critical bridge between basic research and mass production. We are looking for someone with a solid background in materials or chemical engineering and a passion for solving complex problems.
jobEngResp1: Design, execute, and optimize metal recycling and purification process experiments.
jobEngResp2: Analyze experimental data, write R&D reports, and propose process improvement solutions.
jobEngResp3: Operate and maintain lab-scale and pilot-scale reaction equipment.
jobEngResp4: Assist in establishing process SOPs and transferring them to the scale-up production phase.
jobEngResp5: Communicate across departments and collaborate with the team to solve R&D and production challenges.
jobEngQual1: Master's degree (or higher) in Materials, Chemical Engineering, Chemistry, or a related engineering field.
jobEngQual2: Experience in hydrometallurgy, electrochemistry, or materials analysis (SEM, XRD, ICP).
jobEngQual3: Strong problem-analysis and solving skills, with the ability to think independently and plan experiments.
jobEngQual4: Proactive, with a high sense of responsibility and excellent teamwork skills.
jobEngPref1: 2+ years of experience in process development or R&D is a plus.
jobEngPref2: Experience with Python for data analysis or process simulation.
jobEngPref3: Familiarity with DOE (Design of Experiments) methods.
jobAsstAbout: You will assist the R&D team with daily laboratory tasks, ensuring that research and development activities proceed smoothly. This is an excellent opportunity to learn cutting-edge material recycling knowledge while supporting innovative technology. We are looking for a meticulous, responsible, and eager-to-learn partner.
jobAsstResp1: Perform sample preparation and chemical solution mixing according to SOPs.
jobAsstResp2: Assist R&D engineers in operating experimental equipment and recording data.
jobAsstResp3: Responsible for lab environment maintenance, consumables inventory management, and procurement.
jobAsstResp4: Basic data organization and document filing.
jobAsstQual1: Currently enrolled in or graduated from a university/college in a STEM field (Materials, Chemical Eng., Chemistry, Environmental Eng.).
jobAsstQual2: Basic knowledge of chemistry; laboratory work experience is a plus.
jobAsstQual3: Meticulous and responsible work-ethic; able to strictly follow lab safety protocols.
jobAsstQual4: Proficient in basic office software (Word, Excel).
jobAsstPref1: Long-term availability (at least one year) is highly preferred.
jobAsstPref2: Experience with chemical management or basic analytical instruments.
jobInternAbout: This isn't just an internship; it's a chance to be deeply involved in the core R&D of a green-tech startup. You will work closely with our founders and R&D team, applying your classroom knowledge to real-world sustainability challenges. If you are passionate about materials science and eager to make an impact early in your career, this is the place for you.
jobInternResp1: Assist R&D engineers with experimental design and execution.
jobInternResp2: Participate in the development, testing, and data analysis of new processes.
jobInternResp3: Conduct literature reviews, data compilation, and participate in team R&D meetings.
jobInternResp4: Learn and operate advanced materials analysis instruments.
jobInternQual1: Master's student or undergraduate (Junior or above) in Materials, Chemical Engineering, or Chemistry.
jobInternQual2: A strong passion for green technology, circular economy, and sustainable materials.
jobInternQual3: Proactive learner with independent thinking and problem-solving skills.
jobInternQual4: Available to intern for at least 3 days or 24 hours per week.
jobInternPref1: Experience with a lab research project is a plus.
jobInternPref2: Excellent English reading and writing skills for summarizing technical documents.
techFlowTitle: Innovative Process: From Waste to High-Purity Green Materials
techFlowStep1Desc: A safe and compliant recycling network ensures proper classification and storage of waste targets and industrial scrap.
techFlowStep2Desc: Utilizing a unique unidirectional process with low temperature and low chemical usage to significantly reduce carbon emissions.
techFlowStep3Desc: Producing tungsten powder/tungsten oxide with a purity of 99.9% or higher, re-entering the high-end manufacturing supply chain.
leadGenTitle: Interested in detailed ESG and material data?
leadGenDesc: Download the SusMaterial 2026 Technical Whitepaper or contact our engineering experts directly.
